items.claim: Abdul Hussein can be countered due to the risks he takes while in close.
items.quote: He definitely can be countered because the risks he takes while in close

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has surprisingly been outgrappled a few times despite grappling being his main game plan.
items.quote: he has been outgrappled a few times surprisingly despite it being his main game plan.

items.claim: Gibson is a high-paced wrestler who pressures and closes distance to work for double legs, body locks, and the back.
items.quote: Gibson's a high paced wrestler when he's at his best. He generally wants to pressure and close the distance quickly and then just work to double leg or body lock and then to the back from there.

items.claim: Gibson throws naked calf kicks that have cost him, including getting him knocked out in his last fight.
items.quote: The fact that he throws naked calf kicks has cost him a few times now, including getting him knocked out in his last fight.

items.claim: Gibson straight up ignores defense in its entirety.
items.quote: He really just does straight up ignore defense in its entirety.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's grappling is not very impressive and is mostly body lock oriented rather than regular takedowns.
items.quote: his grappling is not even that impressive. Like because it's so body lock oriented and he doesn't really shoot regular takedowns
